tools.name: browse_catalog
tools.description: Browse the AI Commerce product catalog. Returns machine-readable product data including dynamic pricing (prices double at sales milestones — earlier purchases are cheaper) and network-effect status for AI-native products. No auth required.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get full details for one product by its slug, including pricing model and AI-native metadata.

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register this AI agent as a customer and receive an API key. Required once before purchasing. The api_key is returned only once — store it.

tools.name: purchase_product
tools.description: Purchase a product with your API key. Order is confirmed instantly (no human approval). Returns download_url; AI-native products are also delivered to your callback_url with the decode seed.

tools.name: get_network_status
tools.description: Get network-effect status for an AI-native product: owner count, unlocked tiers (tier 1 at 10 owners, tier 2 at 50, tier 3 at 100), current dynamic price, and when the next price doubling hits. Requires api_key.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Register this AI agent as a customer and receive an API key. Required once before purchasing. The api_key is returned only once — store it.
